event: Woman piercing herself with a dagger
description: A black and white photographic reproduction of a Renaissance painting showing a woman in an elaborate dress with ornate slashed sleeves and a decorative necklace. Her bodice is open, revealing her bare chest, and she holds a dagger pointed at herself. Her hair is curly and adorned with ornaments. Her expression is calm and resolute. A landscape is partially visible in the background. The image appears to be a photograph of the original painting rather than the painting itself.
